function: Monitors symbolic memory error rates across compression cycles; ensures time-stable glyph logic and auditability
authentic_output: Memory audit completed; glyph evolution trail compared
corrupted_output: Key glyph anchor points optimized away
information_provided: Monitors symbolic memory error rates across compression cycles. Ensures time-stable glyph logic and auditability.

response_protocol.detect: Detect semantic overwrite, long-term trail pruning, or symbolic miscompression
response_protocol.assess: Assess recall loss severity and symbol divergence risk
response_protocol.respond: Run memory audit; compare glyph evolution trail
response_protocol.release: Avoid optimizing away key glyph anchor points; allow memory to stabilize

decay_model: accelerates with recursive overwrite or update-denial
